since_last: 37% of 89 AI names green; AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure leads +0.57%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 37% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.01% · BTC +0.07% · Gold +0.94% · Nasdaq100 +0.75%. 37% of 89 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure is doing the heavy lifting at +0.57%.

cards.headline: AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure leads, Chip Equipment & AI Hardware lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure at +0.57%; weakest is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at -2.34%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: SYNA is the standout at +5.87%
cards.body: Leaders: SYNA +5.87%, CHKP +2.30%, OKTA +1.88%, PLTR +1.71%, SAP +1.58%. Laggards: MU -4.74%, ARM -3.98%, MRVL -3.77%, BABA -3.61%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -1.75% at $150.33
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -1.75% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
